issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The card checks if your Leader IS Shirahoshi, not if Shirahoshi is on board.
Condition structure incorrect. Should be {"type":"LeaderIsName","name":"Shirahoshi"} not {"type":"HasCardOnBoard","name":"Shirahoshi"}
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action is completely extraneous and not in card text. This effect should not exist.
